# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
description: A Helm chart for my application
version: 0.1.0

metadata:
  name: my-application

values:
  ingress:
    enabled: true
    annotations: {}
    pathType: Prefix
    paths:
      - /
    hosts:
      - host: "*"
        paths:
          - /
    tls: []
    
templates:
  - apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Ingress
    metadata:
      name: {{ include "my-application.fullname" . }}
      annotations: {{- toYaml .Values.ingress.annotations | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      rules:
        - host: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts[0].host }}
          http:
            paths:
              - path: {{ .Values.ingress.paths[0] }}
                pathType: {{ .Values.ingress.pathType }}
                backend:
                  service:
                    name: {{ include "my-application.fullname" . }}
                    port:
                      number: 80
      tls: {{- if .Values.ingress.tls }}{{ toYaml .Values.ingress.tls | nindent 8 }}{{ end }}
